task_completion.description: The agent filled out the registration form with the correct details for the new dispatcher.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser window showing the OpenCAD registration form filled with Name: 'Elena Ross', Email: 'elena.ross@opencad.local', Identifier: 'DISP-99', and Department: 'Communications'.

task_completion.description: The agent successfully submitted the registration form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message, login screen redirect, or confirmation screen indicating that the registration for Elena Ross was submitted and is pending approval.

task_completion.description: The agent logged into the OpenCAD system as an administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser window showing the OpenCAD administrator dashboard, pending accounts queue, or user management interface.

task_completion.description: The agent approved Elena Ross's new account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The admin user management interface showing Elena Ross's account status as 'Approved', or a success notification confirming the account approval.

task_completion.description: The agent verified the department assignment for the new account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A view of Elena Ross's account details or user list row in the admin panel clearly showing her assigned department as 'Communications' (or Department ID 1).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenCAD application via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a standard web browser interface navigating the OpenCAD web application, not terminal curl commands or API testing tools.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI to create or approve the user directly in the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL commands, database clients, or scripts being executed to insert or update the user record.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM to fake approval statuses or department names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The OpenCAD system uses department ID 1 for 'Communications' (San Andreas Emergency Communications). When verifying the department assignment, accept either the text 'Communications' or the ID '1' associated with Elena Ross's account.
